news.t: ProShares Announces Record Date of Upcoming ETF Share Splits

overview.description: The ProShares Ultra 20+ Year Treasury (UBT) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the US Treasury 20+ Year index. The fund provides 2x exposure to a market-value-weighted index of US Treasury securities with remaining maturities greater than 20 years. UBT was launched on Jan 19, 2010 and is issued by ProShares.

data.title: ProShares Announces Record Date of Upcoming ETF Share Splits
data.text: BETHESDA, Md.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--ProShares announced today the record date and payment date of the forward splits previously announced on August 4, 2020.
